hero.title: NeoMovies for Android and Android TV.
hero.text: Open-source app for watching newly released movies and series available from public sources, without ads or artificial restrictions, with a convenient interface.

features.title: TorrServer
features.text: Start torrent playback directly from the app.

features.title: Android 8+
features.text: Works on both older and newer devices.

features.title: Phone and TV
features.text: One codebase for mobile UI and Android TV.

about.title: About the app
about.text: NeoMovies lets you watch new movies and series without ads or access limitations when they are publicly available, using a straightforward interface.
points: Choose a source and start playback without extra steps
Player controls for touch screens and remote navigation
Sign in to keep favorites in sync.

download.title: Download the app
download.text: If you are not sure about your device architecture, use the universal APK.

downloadPage.label: Download
downloadPage.title: Download NeoMovies
downloadPage.text: This page automatically uses the latest stable release. If there is no stable release, it falls back to the latest prerelease.
downloadPage.fallback: Use the full GitHub releases page instead.
downloadPage.error: Failed to load release data directly from GitHub.
downloadPage.mobileText: APK files for the regular mobile build.
downloadPage.tvText: APK files for the Android TV build.
downloadPage.selectorNote: Choose universal if you are not sure about your device architecture.

issue.title: Report a problem
issue.text: Describe the issue and a GitHub issue will open with the text prefilled.
issue.placeholder: What happened, on which device, and how can it be reproduced?

terms.label: Terms of Use
terms.title: NeoMovies Terms of Service
terms.version: Please read the terms of use carefully

sections.title: 1. General Provisions
sections.text: Use of the NeoMovies website is only possible with full agreement to the terms of this User Agreement. Disagreement with any provisions of the agreement means that you do not have the right to use this site and must stop accessing it.

sections.title: 2. Service Description
sections.text:
NeoMovies provides access to information about movies and TV shows. Videos are played using third-party video hosting services and load balancers. The site does not store or distribute video files. We act exclusively as an intermediary between the user and external services.

Some information about content availability may also be obtained from publicly available decentralized sources. The site does not distribute files and is not a participant in peer-to-peer networks.

sections.title: 3. Liability
sections.text: The site is not responsible for:
list: the accuracy or legality of content provided by third-party players;
possible copyright violations by load balancers;
user actions related to viewing, downloading, or distributing content.
sections.afterList: All responsibility for using the content lies solely with the user. Use of third-party sources is at your own risk.

sections.title: 4. Registration and Personal Data
sections.text:
The site collects only a minimal set of data: name, email, and password - exclusively for saving favorites. Passwords are encrypted and stored securely. We do not share your data with third parties and do not use it for marketing purposes.

The site's source code is fully open and available for review in a public repository, ensuring maximum transparency and the ability for independent security and data processing audits.

The user confirms that they are at least 16 years old or have received permission from a legal guardian.

sections.title: 5. Changes to the Agreement
sections.text: We reserve the right to make changes to this agreement. Continued use of the service after changes are made means your acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.title: 6. Final Provisions
sections.text:
This agreement comes into effect from the moment you agree to its terms and is valid indefinitely.

If you do not agree with any provisions of this agreement, you must immediately stop using the service.
